title: 500 x White Serviettes Paper Napkins (30 x 30 cm) 1-Ply Strong Serviettes, Super Soft Paper Tissues, Cocktail Napkins, Disposable Napkins - Best for Christmas, Parties, Halloween, Thanksgiving
features: 👌 PERFECT SIZE: 30 x 30 cm (11.8 x 11.8 inches) when open; 15 x 15 cm (5.9 x 5.9 inches) when folded – these white paper napkins are just the right size for any occasion.

💥 PREMIUM QUALITY: Strong and durable paper serviettes suitable for serving with food and drinks. These super absorbent 1-ply paper napkins come handy for cleaning spills and messy food at parties and events.
💯 ECO-FRIENDLY: Compostable dinner napkins when used, these disposable napkins can be tossed conveniently into home compost or food waste.
⚡ VERSATILE: Highly elegant serviettes napkins can be used as bar / cocktail napkins, wedding and party napkins or as lunch / dinner napkins at home.
🧻 100% NATURAL: These are skin friendly paper tissues and contain no nasty chemicals or harmful ingredients, these disposable tissues are safe to use for any occasion.

✔️ MULTIPURPOSE: Our serviettes tissues are absorbent, do not rip or tear during reasonable use and offer a high quality soft feel. These party napkins are suitable for a variety of general and/or business sectors, including hotels, guest accommodation cafes and diners.
description: Product Description Elegant Lunch Napkin 1-Ply - White PREMIUM QUALITY & DURABLE Napkins are made of high-quality thick paper. Durable napkins are soft, and highly absorbent and can be used for drying hands, wiping sink and counter, surface cleaning, and other general-purpose drying applications. Made of durable paper material, our 1-ply paper napkins for dinner are strong and absorbent, which are great for everyday use. Disposable paper reduces clean-up time so you can enjoy more time with friends and family. After the party just collect the tablecloths with all the garbage and throw those into the trash can. Serviettes Paper Napkins - Bulk ENVIROMENTAL FRIENDLY & BIO-DEGRADABLE These lunch napkins have the elegant look and feel of cloth and are very soft like linen but with the cost-effectiveness and disposable convenience of disposable paper. These napkins are great for an elegant display at any party, event, meal, wedding, or meeting. Our napkins are so neat and clean that you have absolutely no need to use more than one napkin to serve its purpose if you’re using our excellent party napkins. They are extremely absorbent and perfectly durable. Whether it is on your table, kitchen, or bathroom vanity, this thoughtfully-designed napkin holder will keep your napkins presentable, neat, and organized. Your guests will appreciate the convenience and cleanliness of linen-feel napkins available, and you will too. DISPOSABLE NAPKINS These square paper napkins are disposable and will save you valuable time and money on clean-up and laundering services. Add these white napkins to any wedding reception, bridal shower, or tea party to create a cohesive theme throughout your party venue SOFT AND HIGHLY ABSORBENT These quality Fancy Paper Napkins are ultra-soft and feel like towels. Made of thick paper for comfort and absorbency, dry your hands completely in one dabbing! Experience a more delicate yet durable use than your average paper towel. Tri-fold for storage and extra absorbency. VERSATILE USE Experience the elegance of a traditional paper napkin. Thanks to their bright white color, these napkins complement any decor. Use these premium disposable square paper towels for your bathroom, kitchen, dining table, and other outdoor events. MULTIPLE USED NAPKINS These napkins can be used for multiple purposes; they are ideal for parties, weddings, camping, and picnics. They are softer and much stronger than ordinary paper napkins. These are cost-effective disposable napkins. The length and width of this napkin are 30 x 30 cm. When unfolding, ensure your guests have ample space to wipe their hands and faces. One linen-fell napkin can do the work of stacks of standard paper napkins whilst providing your guests with a soft-to-touch alternative to traditional paper napkins. 500 x Serviettes Paper Napkins (1-Ply) 2500 x Serviettes Paper Napkins (1-Ply) 5000 x Serviettes Paper Napkins (1-Ply) 125 x Serviettes Paper Napkins (2-Ply) 1000 x Serviettes Paper Napkins (2-Ply) 2000 x Serviettes Paper Napkins (2-Ply) Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 3.8 out of 5 stars 236 3.8 out of 5 stars 236 3.8 out of 5 stars 236 3.8 out of 5 stars 236 3.8 out of 5 stars 236 3.8 out of 5 stars 236 Price £8.99 £ 8 . 99 — no data — no data £6.90 £ 6 . 90 — no data — no data Ply 1 1 1 2 2 2 Size 30 x 30 cm 30 x 30 cm 30 x 30 cm 40 x 40 cm 40 x 40 cm 40 x 40 cm
